\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4908 introduces Casimir Lemniscate Spectral Gap Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\Delta E = E_{\text{vacuum}}^{(B)} - E_{\text{vacuum}}^{(A)} = \int_{\text{lemniscate}} \mathcal{E}_{\text{Casimir}} dA\]
